caption: A man with glasses, headphones, and a tall, stylized silver wig sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including garments labeled "LEE". He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red and white patterned bowtie. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him on the left side of the screen. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears prominently on the left side of the image, with a smaller version of "BOSS TALK 101" visible in the center. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his right hand. The background remains static, while his facial expressions and the movement of his mouth shift as he talks, indicating a recording or broadcast session.
